response.justification: Aisha has extensive experience (15+ years) in software engineering with diverse roles, including leadership in AI-agent infrastructure and open-source projects. However, her focus leans more toward general software development and geospatial tools rather than AI-specific expertise or entrepreneurial/startup experience. Her academic background includes a Computer Science degree but lacks a Master's/PhD in AI, and her recent AI work is limited to agent frameworks rather than AI product development.
strengths: 15+ years of software engineering experience across diverse domains (web, mobile, embedded, cloud)
Leadership in building AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP code generators)
Entrepreneurial experience with GISCollective, an open-source geospatial platform
concerns: Limited direct AI expertise or AI-powered product development experience
No Master's/PhD in AI-related fields, which is preferred for this role
Recent AI work is tangential (agent frameworks) rather than core AI strategy or products
